title: Voxy Texture Fix
description: Tiny resource pack to work around some weirdness with mipped textures on Voxy LODs
body:
# This pack is no longer needed as of [Voxy 0.2.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy/versions), so make sure you use the latest mod version instead.

Still may be useful if you use an older version:
<details>
 <summary>Old description</summary>

[Voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy) is a great project with a dedicated founder. In the future, Voxy is destined to become even better. But now, it is still in the beginning of its journey.

You might have noticed some weirdness with certain LOD textures (like jungle leaves). VTF works around this by unnoticeably tweaking the textures for better mipmaps generation, ensuring seamless experience with LODs that better match vanilla. Here's an example:
[![Comparison before and after the changes. Left part (VTF is disabled): jungle leaves are inconsistent, one can clearly find the edge between the real chunks and the simplified ones. Right part (VTF is enabled): LODs have the same texture as in vanilla.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e696fcb9e4447e72fdc361556e5a69f2e5fc9722.jpeg)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PXe1rYDR/images/e696fcb9e4447e72fdc361556e5a69f2e5fc9722.jpeg)
Check the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/voxy-texture-fix/gallery) for more examples.
</details>
